narrative:
Precinct Huber Heights C (precinct in Miami County) has 982 registered voters, with 69.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
